ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being diagnosed */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_type" TEXT /* Type of diagnosis (e.g., benign, malignant) */,
  "diagnosis_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments by the diagnosing doctor */,
  "diagnosed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who made the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_diagnosis_type FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosis_type") REFERENCES diagnosis_types ("diagnosis_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_diagnosed_by FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell attribute record */,
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnosis record the attribute belongs to */,
  "clump_thickness" INTEGER /* Clump thickness */,
  "uniformity_of_cell_size" INTEGER /* Uniformity of cell size */,
  "uniformity_of_cell_shape" INTEGER /* Uniformity of cell shape */,
  "marginal_adhesion" INTEGER /* Marginal adhesion */,
  "single_epithelial_cell_size" INTEGER /* Single epithelial cell size */,
  "bare_nuclei" INTEGER /* Bare nuclei */,
  "bland_chromatin" INTEGER /* Bland chromatin */,
  "normal_nuclei" INTEGER /* Normal nuclei */,
  "mitoses" INTEGER /* Mitoses */,
  "attribute_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the cell attributes */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the cell sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cell_attributes_diagnosis_id FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosis_id") REFERENCES diagnoses ("diagnosis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, researcher, medical staff) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed and salted password of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnosis record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the diagnosis record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the diagnosis record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_diagnosis_id FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosis_id") REFERENCES diagnoses ("diagnosis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnosis_types" (
  "diagnosis_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis type */,
  "diagnosis_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnosis type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the diagnosis type (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_medical_history" (
  "medical_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the medical history belongs to */,
  "medical_condition" TEXT /* Medical condition */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment */,
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnosis record */,
  "date_of_treatment" TEXT /* Date when the treatment was administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medical_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_medical_history_diagnosis_id FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosis_id") REFERENCES diagnoses ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the research study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research study */,
  "study_date" TEXT /* Date of the research study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_studies_study_date FOREIGN KEY ("study_date") REFERENCES diagnoses ("diagnosis_date")
)
